name: portrait-hub
description: PortraitHub GPU 推理与人像智能服务

scripts.check: npm run test:node && npm run console:check
scripts.console:generate: python tools/export_openapi.py && npm run generate -w @portrait-hub/console-next && npx prettier --write frontend/console-next/src/api/generated.ts
scripts.console:check: npm run console:lint && npm run console:test && npm run console:typecheck && npm run console:build
